title: Homepage redesign amendment — hero-card stats corrected, 21 additional stale links repaired
summary: Two corrections to the homepage redesign dispatch. (1) Hero-card at-a-glance stats in index.html were replaced: fabricated ARR ($190K), headcount (11), SOC2 audit, Series A line, and 'design partners + paid pilots' customer count have been removed and replaced with data sourced directly from briefings/015.html scorecard and snapshot sections (§02 and §07). The hero-meta 'Narrative ~T+200d' span was replaced with 'Confidence 9.5/10' (sourced from snapshot). (2) A wider grep across all non-briefings HTML files found 21 additional anchor links labeled 'Briefing No. 001' (or equivalent) that still pointed to '../index.html'. All 21 have been updated to '../briefings/001.html'. Files real-time/index.html (JSON timeline data) and customers/northwind.html (Briefing No. 004 reference) were correctly left unchanged.

hero_card_before: SOC2: Type II audit window open
hero_card_after: MCP surfaces: 4 live · graph · Console · Recruiter · connectors
Agent roster: 10 active · 0 escalations to Chairman
Burn / runway: $330K / mo · runway opens T+200d
corrections.hero_card_source: briefings/015.html §02 snapshot and §07 scorecard — wall-clock data only
corrections.stale_links_source_pattern: href="../index.html" with anchor text labeling the link as Briefing No. 001 or Chairman's Briefing No. 001

o1_status: No new findings. Amendment does not introduce new interactive elements. Hero-card now carries zero unverified statistics.
